title: Learning Product Outcomes, Command Vocabulary, and Session Contract · Type Recall
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs learning product outcomes, command vocabulary, and session contract from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded learner-facing command product charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Define learner population, science or coding decision, command journey, accepted failure, feedback, and observable learning value.
Specify commands, arguments, examples, aliases, case and whitespace policy, invalid forms, and stable results as a small language.
Model ready, prompting, parsing, dispatching, waiting, reporting, aborted, closing, and closed states with legal transitions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
